builder_scope: scene setup, material helper recipes, cameras, lighting, root rig, and whole-cell context socket only
notes: Created Blender scene infrastructure without constructing the full rough ER organelle.
Added reusable organic material helper functions inside build_rough_er.py for later membrane, ribosome, and cavity phases.
Added RoughER_RootRig as the parent control object and WholeCell_ContextSocket as the only manifest component visualization.
Left membrane sheets, ribosome clusters, folding cavities, nucleus connection, Golgi handoff vesicles, and interaction hotspots unbuilt by design for Phase 1.

visual_organic_quality.notes: Scene uses non-default organic material recipes and a rounded socket marker, but full organic rough ER form is not part of Phase 1.

biology_accuracy.notes: No unsupported biological structures were added; socket establishes whole-cell placement context only.

animation_functionality.notes: RoughER_RootRig parent exists for future animation-ready component hierarchy.

roblox_export_readiness.notes: Phase 1 scene elements are simple and named, but future mesh density, material baking, and hierarchy cleanup remain risks.

whole_cell_integration.notes: WholeCell_ContextSocket exists for later placement relative to the nucleus and cell model.

roblox_export_risks: Procedural shader nodes will need baking or simplification for Roblox import.
Future rough ER membrane folds must be controlled for triangle count.
Future ribosome clusters may need instancing or mesh merging to avoid excessive object counts.
Animation pivots and sockets must remain stable after FBX or GLTF export.
next_recommended_phase: Phase 2: build the organic folded teal membrane sheet/tube mass around RoughER_RootRig, keeping ribosome and vesicle work separate for later phases.
